description_long: This object is a vertical pole-mounted directional sign featuring three arrow-shaped signboards attached at different heights and angles. The pole is topped with a pointed, conical finial, giving it a classic and slightly ornamental appearance. Each signboard is a flat, rectangular panel with one end shaped into an arrowhead, clearly indicating direction. The signboards are evenly spaced along the upper portion of the pole and oriented in different directions, allowing for multiple route indications. The surface appears metallic with a dark, matte finish, and there is no visible text or iconography on the signboards. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for guiding pedestrians or vehicles in urban or park environments.
description: A vertical pole with three arrow-shaped signboards pointing in different directions, topped with a pointed finial and finished in a dark metallic color.
description_view_0: The sign is seen from the side, showing the stacked arrangement of the three arrow-shaped boards and the pointed finial on top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the flat faces of the signboards, making the arrow shapes and their directional orientation more visible.
description_view_2: The sign is viewed at an angle, revealing the staggered placement of the boards and the depth of the pole.
description_view_3: A direct view of the signboards' faces, clearly showing two arrows pointing in opposite directions and the central pole.
